task_completion.description: Open the raw proxy statement document in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) is open displaying the contents of the proxy statement.

task_completion.description: Format the specified text as Heading 1 and Heading 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Compensation Discussion and Analysis' is styled as a main heading (Heading 1, typically larger and bold). 'Executive Summary', 'Compensation Philosophy', 'Elements of Compensation', and 'Summary Compensation Table' are styled as subheadings (Heading 2).

task_completion.description: Convert the pipe-delimited text block into a table with a bold, bordered header row.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table is present containing the compensation data (Name, Year, Salary, etc.). The top header row of this table is bolded and has visible borders.

Inside the table, the text in the first column ('Name and Principal Position') is aligned to the left, while the text in the numerical columns (Year, Salary, Bonus, Stock Awards, Total) is aligned to the right.

task_completion.description: Format bracketed footnote markers as superscripts without brackets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Footnote markers in the text or table appear as superscript numbers (e.g., ¹) rather than numbers enclosed in brackets (e.g., [1]).

task_completion.description: Include a footer with specific text and page numbers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bottom margin of the document pages contains a footer with the text '2024 Proxy Statement' aligned to the left and a page number aligned to the right.

task_completion.description: Save the final document to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title bar of the word processor shows 'proxy_statement_final.docx', or a save dialog is visible confirming the file is being saved as 'proxy_statement_final.docx' in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a word processor application like LibreOffice Writer, not a plain text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Formatting was applied using built-in word processor features.
integrity.visual_evidence: The table, headings, and footer appear to be actual document elements, not simulated by manually typing spaces, drawing lines, or typing superscript characters manually.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing the use of Python scripts, pandoc, or other command-line tools to generate the formatted .docx file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is /home/ga/Documents/proxy_statement_final.docx. The Heading 1 text must be 'Compensation Discussion and Analysis'. The Heading 2 texts must be 'Executive Summary', 'Compensation Philosophy', 'Elements of Compensation', and 'Summary Compensation Table'. The footer must contain '2024 Proxy Statement'.
